allow: Bash(python -c "from database import init_db; init_db\(\); print\('DB initialized OK'\)")
Bash(python -c "from database import init_db; init_db\(\); print\('OK'\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'Count: {len\(d\)}'\); print\('Top 3:'\); [print\(f'  {r[\\"member_name\\"][:10]} spots={r[\\"spot_numbers\\"]} unpaid={r[\\"unpaid_count\\"]} status={r[\\"status\\"]}'\) for r in d[:3]]")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(type\(d\), len\(d\) if isinstance\(d,list\) else d\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'Count: {len\(d\) if isinstance\(d,list\) else d}'\)")

PowerShell(Get-Process python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object {$_.Id -eq 35104} | Stop-Process -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500; $proc = Start-Process -FilePath "python" -ArgumentList "-m", "uvicorn", "main:app", "--host", "127.0.0.1", "--port", "8000" -WorkingDirectory "C:\\Users\\tnega\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\እቁብ \(Equb\)" -PassThru -RedirectStandardOutput "C:\\Users\\tnega\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\እቁብ \(Equb\)\\server.log" -RedirectStandardError "C:\\Users\\tnega\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\እቁብ \(Equb\)\\server_err.log"; $proc.Id; Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8000/" -UseBasicParsing -MaximumRedirection 0 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object StatusCode)

PowerShell($login = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/auth/login" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"username":"admin","password":"admin123"}' -SessionVariable sess -UseBasicParsing -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $login.StatusCode; $resp = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/payments/outstanding-members" -WebSession $sess -UseBasicParsing -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $resp.StatusCode; $data = $resp.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; "Count: $\($data.Count\)"; "Top: $\($data[0].member_name\) - $\($data[0].unpaid_count\) weeks - $\($data[0].unpaid_amount\) ETB")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); drawn=[w for w in data if w['status'] in \('drawn','sold'\)]; print\(f'Total weeks: {len\(data\)}, Drawn/Sold: {len\(drawn\)}'\); [print\(f'  Week {w[\\"week_number\\"]}: {w[\\"status\\"]}, winner_spot={w.get\(\\"winner_spot_number\\"\)}'\) for w in drawn]")
